projects.name: Migrate to SPM
projects.endGoal: Migrate all ios-pago modules to SPM, consolidate into a single integrator app, support local/remote per-dependency switching, and release via xcframeworks.

repos.name: ios-prepay
repos.lastCommit: Package.swift done — depends on core, ui, network, buffer

repos.name: ios-hub
repos.lastCommit: Package.swift done — aggregates all 9 SDK deps, Sources/Tests layout committed

working: 11/11 modules have Package.swift (including ios-hub and ios-prepay)
switch-deps.sh works for bills, rca, esim + integrators
blocked: Single integrator — consolidate rca/bills into ios-esim-integrator
Per-dependency switching — toggle individual deps independently
xcframework releases — build & release from unified integrator
switch-deps for core, ui, network, buffer, freemium, pay, prepay, hub
projects.progress: All 11/11 modules have Package.swift (ios-hub + ios-prepay completed). 3 integrators exist but need consolidation. Global dep switching works. Per-dep switching and xcframework releases pending.

projects.name: Loto in Pago from Android
projects.endGoal: Port Loto 6/49 from Android to iOS. Adds a new revenue stream for Pago.
working: Loto 6/49 — full happy flow e2e (game list, selection, numbers, luck, eligibility, checkout, ticket details)
Profile management — create, edit, county/city cascade, CNP/phone/address validation
History bottom sheet, payment summary, ticket details button
Phases 1-4 complete (gap analysis, network, business logic, screens)
blocked: PDF download — server 504 Gateway Timeout on pago-loto/tickets/{id}/pdf (nginx). Client code confirmed working, needs BE fix.
Edge cases (US-014) — network errors, payment cancelled, session expired
projects.progress: Phase 5 (Flow Verification) in progress. Loto 6/49 happy flow works e2e. Loto 5/40 and Joker not yet verified. Profile implemented but needs full verification.
issues: PDF download — server 504 on pago-loto/tickets/{id}/pdf (nginx). Client code works, blocked on BE fix.

projects.name: Maestro fixes
